title: service
summary:
Link relation type "service": Indicates a URI that can be used to retrieve a
      service document. Defined in RFC5023.
source_version: IANA registry, Last-Modified: Mon, 12 Jan 2026 18:11:26 GMT

raw_columns.Description:
Indicates a URI that can be used to retrieve a
      service document.
raw_columns.Notes:
When used in an Atom document, this relation type specifies
      Atom Publishing Protocol service documents by default.  Requested
      by James Snell.
